raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the original text into a clear motivation → contribution → method → training → results flow.",
    "R1.6": "The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, tightening claims to what the evidence supports and removing near-duplicate restatements.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, noting assumptions about baselines and the scope of the 0.71 F1 figure, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all required dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free with no regressions; it identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming and lack of clarity.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the original text into a clear motivation → contribution → method → training → results flow.
rationale.R1.6: The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, tightening claims to what the evidence supports and removing near-duplicate restatements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, noting assumptions about baselines and the scope of the 0.71 F1 figure, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all required dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free with no regressions; it identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming and lack of clarity.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
